description_long: This is a large, armored combat tactical vehicle with a robust, angular body and a green and black camouflage paint scheme. The vehicle features six large, rugged tires designed for off-road and urban mobility, and its exterior is covered in thick, sloped armor plating for enhanced protection. On the roof, there are visible hatches, periscopes, and what appears to be a weapon mount, likely for a machine gun or similar armament. The front of the vehicle is equipped with headlights and reinforced panels, while the sides display access hatches and additional equipment storage. Antennas and other communication devices are mounted on the roof, indicating advanced operational capabilities. The overall design suggests a focus on survivability, mobility, and versatility in urban and combat environments.
description: A heavily armored, six-wheeled combat tactical vehicle with green and black camouflage, roof-mounted equipment, and reinforced body panels.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sloped armored nose, headlights, and roof-mounted hatches and antennas.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the three large wheels, side hatches, and the roof weapon mount.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back armor, rear hatches, and the continuation of the camouflage pattern.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing wheels, side access points, and roof details.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One visible weapon mount on the roof, likely for a machine gun or similar armament.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, sloped armor plating; reinforced panels on the front and sides.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Woodland camouflage with irregular green and black patches in a disruptive pattern.
attribute_tire_type: Six large off-road tires with deep tread pattern, designed for rugged terrain.
